text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You won't get me this time! I'm gonna bust that
sneaky trick of yours, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, back again so soon? All right, I'm more than
happy to put you under my spell. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, play it cool all you want. Today, I've got a
trusty helper by my side!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama? Now that's a surprise... To think my
magic has even you bewitched!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Not really... I just heard you do the best card
tricks in the academy.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
That, and there's a big payoff if I can see past
your ruse.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama's gonna serve me up her special spicy
offal stew that's the talk of the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, okay. Well, I have no qualms in playing my
part. I have my pride as an entertainer!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... You're not all talk. Nimble fingers, and
you know how to pull someone's gaze.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You're really staring me down. All this
flattery means I'll have to step up my game.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hah...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, was that your doing? So you can even
control your opponent's breathing...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so stiff. Look into my eyes and my eyes
only. I've prepared a show just for you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Aw, geez. Fuji, time out!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Whatever is the matter, Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but could we call this whole thing off? I just
realized how embarrassin' it is calling someone to
fight in my place.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for draggin' you into this, Nakayama. I'll
make you some of that stew regardless.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Just when things were getting interesting.
Whatever... No harm done.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna hone my skills though, Fuji. And then...
I'll be coming for you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, sure thing. Feel free to drop by if you're
looking to have a sweet dream. ♪
